mapper.insert: insert into t_label(title, author_id, summary, status, create_time, update_time) VALUES (#{title},#{author_id},#{summary},#{status},now(),now())
mapper.update:
UPDATE t_label SET
title = #{title},
author_id = #{authorId},
summary = #{summary},
status = #{status},
update_time = NOW() where id = #{id}
